title: hieracium viscosum subsp. tarchanum
intro: Hieracium viscosum subsp. tarchanum, also known as Sticky Hawkweed, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It is used in traditional herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. The health benefits of Hieracium viscosum subsp. tarchanum are believed to include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system, although more research is needed to confirm these claims. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used as a tea, tincture, or salve, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
